name: DebridHub
description: Replaces the *arr stack: direct streaming via self-refreshing .strm files, batch downloads, Torznab search, a watchlist, a Seerr/Jellyseerr request webhook, and a library organizer.
overview: Stream and batch-download from Real-Debrid / AllDebrid inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: Fixes watchlist/Seerr grabs failing at the add-magnet step. AddMagnet (and selectFiles) now back off and retry on Real-Debrid rate limiting like the read calls do, and on failure report Real-Debrids actual error (e.g. permission_denied, too_many_requests) instead of a generic HTTP error.
